calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-24-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR. Brenda Fields.
Petitioner, Jonathan David Gauntlett present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Jonathan Pearl.
Decree signed in open court.
